functions.label: Smooth Escape Ramp
functions.description: Use the continuous escape estimate as the upstream color signal.

functions.label: Phase Orbit
functions.description: Use orbit phase as the upstream signal.

functions.label: Iteration Bands
functions.description: Quantize the escape signal into stepped iteration bands.

functions.label: Escape Magnitude
functions.description: Use the orbit magnitude as the upstream escape-time source.

functions.label: Orbit Stripe
functions.description: Fold orbit phase into a controllable stripe source before palette lookup.

functions.label: Root Proximity
functions.description: Use nearest-root proximity as the upstream source on basin-capable fractal families.

functions.label: Root Index
functions.description: Use the resolved nearest-root classification index as the upstream basin source.

functions.label: SDF Signed Distance
functions.description: Use Lens SDF signed distance as the upstream color signal.

functions.label: SDF Inside / Outside
functions.description: Use the Lens SDF inside/outside classification as the upstream color signal.

functions.label: SDF Boundary Band
functions.description: Use the Lens SDF boundary band as the upstream color signal.

functions.label: SDF Normal Angle
functions.description: Use the Lens SDF normal angle as the upstream phase signal.

functions.label: SDF Curvature
functions.description: Use the Lens SDF curvature estimate as the upstream color signal.

functions.label: Lens Field V2 Response
functions.description: Use the GPU-backed Lens Field v2 legacy distance response while preserving the legacy Lens panel.

functions.label: Identity
functions.description: Keep the incoming source signal unchanged before palette materialization.

functions.label: Offset + Scale
functions.description: Shift and scale the incoming signal before palette materialization.

functions.label: Repeat
functions.description: Tile the incoming signal into repeating bands.

functions.label: Posterize
functions.description: Quantize the incoming signal into stepped bands.

functions.label: Mirror Repeat
functions.description: Tile the incoming signal into a mirrored triangle-wave pattern.

functions.label: Bias + Gain Curve
functions.description: Remap the incoming signal through a bias/gain curve while preserving neutral defaults.

functions.label: Smooth Window
functions.description: Gate the incoming signal through a smoothstep window over the current wrap domain.

functions.label: Heatmap
functions.description: Wrap escape signals through the cyclic escape palette.

functions.label: Phase Wheel
functions.description: Wrap signal values around a phase wheel palette.

functions.label: Banded Heatmap
functions.description: Map banded escape signals through the runtime band palette.

functions.label: Explaino CMap
functions.description: Map scalar signals through the legacy ExplainO seed colormap lineage.

functions.label: Root Classic Palette
functions.description: Materialize basin root classification through the existing root-classic palette lineage.

functions.label: Joy Root Palette
functions.description: Materialize basin root classification through the existing joy-basins palette lineage.

functions.label: Contrast Lift
functions.description: Apply the default escape-time grading profile.

functions.label: Phase Finish
functions.description: Apply the default phase grading profile.

functions.label: Band Finish
functions.description: Apply the default banded grading profile through the legacy grading mirror.

functions.label: Basin Default
functions.description: Preserve the legacy basin grading defaults without exposing fake tuning controls.

functions.label: Neutral Finish
functions.description: Apply a neutral grading finish through the shared exposure, saturation, and contrast owners.

functions.label: Tone Map Finish
functions.description: Apply tone mapping after tint, saturation, and contrast through the shared exposure, saturation, and contrast owners.

functions.label: Grade Glow
functions.description: Apply shared exposure, saturation, and contrast grading, then add a dedicated glow highlight finish through the runtime glow owner.

functions.label: Balance Void Grade
functions.description: Apply the reusable balance-void grading manifold through dedicated runtime owners instead of the shared neutral or ExplainO-specific finish rails.
